full_text:
Empress Dong 董皇后
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Empress Dong (董皇后)was born in Hejian. Of poor background, encouraged Ling to sell ranks. Lost to He family in political clash. Empress Dong was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Empress Dong lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
